title: Order Fulfilment Lead (Incoterm)
description:
about the company
Representing a premier global industrial engineering firm, we are seeking an Order Fulfillment Lead to drive operational excellence. This role is central to synchronizing pricing accuracy and customer experience by overseeing the end-to-end supply chain lifecycle. You will mentor a multi-disciplinary team—including customer service, procurement, and warehouse staff—to harmonize order processing, inter-company sourcing, and inventory integrity.

details

  • East
  • M-F 9am - 6pm, hybrid & flexi work arrangement


about the job

Order Management & Service Excellence

Drive operational efficiency across the order-to-cash lifecycle, overseeing high-volume entry, tracking, and fiscal documentation.

Uphold rigorous standards for lead-time accuracy and fulfillment precision, managing the journey from initial inquiry to final handover.

Authorize commercial quotations and maintain price integrity within the ERP system to safeguard margins.

Facilitate the expedited deployment of critical components for technical claims, ensuring full traceability and the restoration of client operations.

Sourcing & Stakeholder Management

  • Manage the acquisition of resources through internal channels to maintain continuous service levels while monitoring freight overheads.

  • Validate purchase requisitions and supplier documentation to maintain high standards of data integrity and procedural adherence.

  • Facilitate cross-border communication with partner entities to resolve complexities in product requirements and shipping logistics.

skills and experience required

  • Preferably individuals with at least 3 years of relevant experience and has led a small team

To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you may contact Noelle at noelle.ng@randstad.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
